subject: [PATCH 2/5] iova: drop dead cached_node / cached32_node infrastructure

2026-05-13.patch_summary: This patch removes the unused and redundant infrastructure for cached_node and cached32_node in the iova (I/O Virtual Address) code. The fields were maintained on every insert and delete operation but never consulted during allocation. The useful logic from __cached_rbnode_delete_update() is preserved by moving it inline into remove_iova(). This change simplifies the code and removes unnecessary complexity.
